title: They Cannot See the Wreaths We Place.
content:

content:

title: As The Indian.
content:
Lo, the poor Indian, whose untutored mind

    --Pope.

title: Deprive This Strange and Complex World.
The Valley of the San Miguel.
Nature's Child.
content:
I love to tread the solitudes,
    The forests and the trackless woods,
    Where nature, undisturbed by man,
    Pursues her voluntary plan.

title: The Miner.
content:

title: Battle Hymn.
content:
Almighty Power! Who through the past

title: Dying Hymn.
content:
The hour-glass speeds its final sands,

title: To Mother Huberta.
content: As repeated in chorus on the anniversary of her Names-day by the Sisters of St. Hubert at St. Anthony's Hospital, Denver, Col., Oct. 29, 1900.

title: Empty are the Mother's Arms.
content:

title: Gently Lead Me, Star Divine.
content:

title: Smiles.
content:

content:

content:

title: The Legend of St. Regimund.
content:

title: Hidden Sorrows.
content:
For some the river of life would seem

title: Life's Mystery
content:
I live, I move, I know not how, nor why,

Ashes to Ashes, Dust to Dust.
content:

content:

title: To the Pines.
content:
Ye sad musicians of the wood,
    Whose dirges fill the solitude,
    Whose minor strains and melodies
    Are wafted on the whispering breeze,

title: Love's Plea.
content:

title: Shall Our Memories Live When the Sod Rolls Above Us?
content:

content:

title: As the Shifting Sands of the Desert.
content:

title: Think Not that the Heart is Devoid of Emotion.
content:

title: Shall Love, as the Bridal Wreath, Whither and Die?
content:
Shall love as the bridal wreath, wither and die?

    As the years of the future pass rapidly by,

title: The Unknowable.
content:

title: The Nations Peril.
content:
Ill fares the land, to hastening ills a prey,
    Where wealth accumulates and men decay.
    --Goldsmith.

title: The Spirit of freedom is Born of the Mountains.
Missed.
content:

        A mother's fond caress;
    That childish smile a void conceals
        Of aching loneliness.

content:

content:

content:

content:

title: There is an Air of Majesty.
content:
